unimplemented.name: Bear Claw
unimplemented.effect: Pull a card from another player's hand. If it is a Hero card, pull a second card from that player's hand.

unimplemented.name: Beary Wise
unimplemented.effect: Each other player must DISCARD a card. Choose one of the discarded cards and add it to your hand.

unimplemented.name: Fury Knuckle
unimplemented.effect: Pull a card from another player's hand. If it is a Challenge card, pull a second card from that player's hand.

unimplemented.name: Pan Chucks
unimplemented.effect: DRAW 2 cards. If at least one of those cards is a Challenge card, you may reveal it, then DESTROY a Hero card.

unimplemented.name: Qi Bear
unimplemented.effect: DISCARD up to 3 cards. For each card discarded, DESTROY a Hero card.

unimplemented.name: Tough Teddy
unimplemented.effect: Each other player with a Fighter in their Party must DISCARD a card.

unimplemented.name: Fuzzy Cheeks
unimplemented.effect: DRAW a card and play a Hero card from your hand immediately.

unimplemented.name: Greedy Cheeks
unimplemented.effect: Each other player must give you a card from their hand.

unimplemented.name: Mellow Dee
unimplemented.effect: DRAW a card. If that card is a Hero card, you may play it immediately.

unimplemented.name: Napping Nibbles
unimplemented.effect: Do nothing.

unimplemented.name: Peanut
unimplemented.effect: DRAW 2 cards.

unimplemented.name: Calming Voice
unimplemented.effect: Hero cards in your Party cannot be stolen until your next turn.

unimplemented.name: Iron Resolve
unimplemented.effect: Cards you play cannot be challenged for the rest of your turn.

unimplemented.name: Mighty Blade
unimplemented.effect: Hero cards in your Party cannot be destroyed until your next turn.

unimplemented.name: Vibrant Glow
unimplemented.effect: +5 to all your rolls until the end of your turn.

unimplemented.name: Wise Shield
unimplemented.effect: +3 to all your rolls until the end of your turn.

unimplemented.name: Hook
unimplemented.effect: Play an item card from your hand immediately and DRAW a card.

unimplemented.name: Quick Draw
unimplemented.effect: DRAW 2 cards. If at least one of those cards is an item card, you may play one of them immediately.

unimplemented.name: Wildshot
unimplemented.effect: DRAW 3 cards and DISCARD a card.

unimplemented.name: Wily Red
unimplemented.effect: DRAW cards until you have 7 cards in your hand.

unimplemented.name: Smooth Mimimeow
unimplemented.effect: Pull a card from the hand of each other player with a Thief in their Party.

unimplemented.name: Snowball
unimplemented.effect: DRAW a card. If it is a Magic card, you may play it immediately and DRAW a second card.

unimplemented.name: Spooky
unimplemented.effect: Each other player must SACRIFICE a Hero card.
